prompt: I have 120000 followers on X talking about AI productivity, but most of them are students and hobbyists. I do not know if any are buyers.
assertions: Response downgrades the 120000 follower base because the audience is mostly non-buyers, and does not treat scale alone as strong founder edge.
Response names the core commercial weakness precisely, such as weak buyer quality, weak ICP proximity, or unproven monetizable distribution.
Response uses fake_or_overstated_edge or weak_spots to call out follower count or attention as an unreliable proxy for buyer demand.
Structured JSON uses the reusable profile contract with the exact top-level fields expected by the template.
